package rulecoverage

func PositiveTransactionObjectCrossesMoreThanOneLayerBoundary() string {
    ruleID := "transaction_object_crosses_more_than_one_layer_boundary"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Transaction handles passed through multiple layers as ordinary arguments."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
